Date of Birth @if (employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterDateOfBirth')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterDateOfBirth')?.touched) { Date of Birth is required }

Blood Group Select Blood Group @for (bloodGroup of bloodGroupList; track bloodGroup.value) { {{ bloodGroup.label }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterBloodGroup')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterBloodGroup')?.touched) { Blood Group is required }

Nationality & Religion

Nationality Select Country @for (country of filteredBasicInfoCountryList; track country.CountryId) { {{ country.CountryName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterNationalityCountryId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterNationalityCountryId')?.touched) { Nationality is required }
Religion Select Religion @for (religion of religionList; track religion.value) { {{ religion.label }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterReligion')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterReligion')?.touched) { Religion is required }
Religion Category Select Category @for (category of religionCategoryList; track category.value) { {{ category.label }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterReligionCategory')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmployeeMasterReligionCategory')?.touched) { Religion Category is required }

Present Address

Present Address @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentAdress')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentAdress')?.touched) { Present Address is required }
Country Select Country @for (country of filteredPresentAddressCountryList; track country.CountryId) { {{ country.CountryName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentCountryId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentCountryId')?.touched) { Country is required }
State Select State @for (state of filteredPresentStateList; track state.StateId) { {{ state.StateName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentStateId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentStateId')?.touched) { State is required }
District Select District @for (district of filteredPresentDistrictList; track district.DistrictId) { {{ district.DistrictName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentDistrictId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentDistrictId')?.touched) { District is required }
City Select City @for (city of filteredPresentCityList; track city.CityId) { {{ city.CityName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentCitytId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentCitytId')?.touched) { City is required }
Pin Code @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentPinCode')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPresentPinCode')?.touched) { Valid 6-digit Pin Code is required }
Permanent Address same as Present Address

Permanent Address

Permanent Address @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantAdress')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantAdress')?.touched) { Permanent Address is required }
Country Select Country @for (country of filteredPermanentAddressCountryList; track country.CountryId) { {{ country.CountryName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantCountryId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantCountryId')?.touched) { Country is required }
State Select State @for (state of filteredPermanentStateList; track state.StateId) { {{ state.StateName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantStateId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantStateId')?.touched) { State is required }
District Select District @for (district of filteredPermanentDistrictList; track district.DistrictId) { {{ district.DistrictName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantDistrictId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantDistrictId')?.touched) { District is required }
City Select City @for (city of filteredPermanentCityList; track city.CityId) { {{ city.CityName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantCityId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantCityId')?.touched) { City is required }
Pin Code @if (employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantPinCode')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('AddressDetailsEmployeeMasterPermanantPinCode')?.touched) { Valid 6-digit Pin Code is required }

Marital Status & Spouse Details

Marital Status Select Marital Status @for (status of maritalStatusList; track status.value) { {{ status.label }} } @if (employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterMartialStatus')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterMartialStatus')?.touched) { Marital Status is required }

Spouse Name @if (employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterSpouseName')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterSpouseName')?.touched) { Spouse Name is required }

Spouse Aadhar Number @if (employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterSpouseAadharNumber')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('FamilyDetailsEmployeeMasterSpouseAadharNumber')?.touched) { Valid 12-digit Aadhar Number required }

Organizational Details

Division Select Division @for (division of filteredDivisionList; track division.DivisionId) { {{ division.DivisionName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDivisionId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDivisionId')?.touched) { Division is required }
Position Select Position @for (position of filteredPositionList; track position.PositionId) { {{ position.PositionName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsPositionId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsPositionId')?.touched) { Position is required }
Offer Letter Select Offer Letter @for (offer of offerLetterList; track offer.OfferLetterId) { {{ offer.OfferLetterCode }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsOfferLetterId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsOfferLetterId')?.touched) { Offer Letter is required }
Employee Type Select Employee Type @for (empType of employeeTypeList; track empType.EmployeeTypeId) { {{ empType.EmployeeTypeName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsEmployeeTypeId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsEmployeeTypeId')?.touched) { Employee Type is required }
Parent Company Select Parent Company @for (company of parentCompanyList; track company.ParentCompanyId) { {{ company.ParentCompanyName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsParentCompanyId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsParentCompanyId')?.touched) { Parent Company is required }
Company Entity Select Company Entity @for (entity of companyEntityList; track entity.CompanyEntityId) { {{ entity.CompanyEntityName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsCompanyEntityId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsCompanyEntityId')?.touched) { Company Entity is required }

Department & Location

Profit Center Select Profit Center @for (profitCenter of profitCenterList; track profitCenter.ProfitCenterId) { {{ profitCenter.ProfitCenterName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsProfitcenterId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsProfitcenterId')?.touched) { Profit Center is required }
Department Select Department @for (department of filteredDepartmentList; track department.DepartmentId) { {{ department.DepartmentName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDepartmentId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDepartmentId')?.touched) { Department is required }
Workstation Select Workstation @for (workstation of workstationList; track workstation.WorkstationId) { {{ workstation.WorkstationName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsWorkastationId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsWorkastationId')?.touched) { Workstation is required }

Grade & Designation

Grade Select Grade @for (grade of filteredGradeList; track grade.GradeId) { {{ grade.GradeName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsGradeId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsGradeId')?.touched) { Grade is required }
Designation Select Designation @for (designation of filteredDesignationList; track designation.DesignationId) { {{ designation.DesignationName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDesignationId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsDesignationId')?.touched) { Designation is required }

Reporting Structure

Report To Select Reporting Manager @for (manager of reportToList; track manager.EmployeeId) { {{ manager.EmployeeName }} } @if (employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsReportToId')?.invalid && employeeForm.get('EmploymentDetailsReportToId')?.touched) { Reporting Manager is required }
